31 41 16.10\nSheet Piling Systems
(0005) Installation and removal of solid 2-inch sheeting for\ntrenches 5 to 10 feet deep and 42 inches to 12 feet wide
(0010) Sheet piling, no wales, 22 psf, 15 ft excavation, left in place
(0020) Sheet piling, no wales, 22 psf, 15 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0030) Sheet piling, no wales, 27 psf, 20 ft excavation, left in place
(0040) Sheet piling, no wales, 27 psf, 20 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0050) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 25 ft excavation, left in place
(0060) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 25 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0070) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 40 ft excavation, left in place
(0080) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 40 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0110) Sheet piling, no wales, 22 psf, 15 ft excavation, left in place
(0120) Sheet piling, no wales, 22 psf, 15 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0130) Sheet piling, no wales, 27 psf, 20 ft excavation, left in place
(0140) Sheet piling, no wales, 27 psf, 20 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
(0150) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 25 ft excavation, left in place
(0160) Sheet piling, no wales, 38 psf, 25 ft excavation, drive,\nextract and salvage
Minimum suggested crew size: three crane crew operators and five pile drivers

Notes:
1. Work for typical unstable soil includes: solid sheeting; 4- by 6-inch stringers; 4-foot center-to-center
hangers; cleats and 4- by 6-inch cross bracing spaced 7 feet center to center.
2. Design of shoring and sheeting will vary with soil conditions, width, and depth of trench, etc.
3. Installation should be in accordance with the EM 385-1-1.
Legend: psf = pounds per square foot
